intro_cards.title: Let's: ましょう
intro_cards.body:
ましょう means 'let's ~' — proposing a joint action with enthusiasm.

Pattern: [verb stem] + ましょう

• 行きましょう！(Let's go!)
• 一緒に食べましょう。(Let's eat together.)
• 始めましょう。(Let's begin.)

Casual equivalent: plain form + う/よう
• 行こう！(Let's go!)

Note: ましょう is slightly more assertive — the speaker proposes.
ませんか is more inviting — asking if the listener is up for it.
